dtsPropsFor.Spinner:
/** Extra classes (e.g. sizing/colour). The spinner is sized 1rem by default. */
className?: string;
dtsPropsFor.FeatureGrid: /* No props — renders Figment's three static feature pillars (Generate / Edit / Vectorize). */
dtsPropsFor.RecentProjects: /* No props — fetches and renders the recent-projects grid as ProjectCard items. */
dtsPropsFor.PromptBox: /* No props — the home-page entry composer (prompt + optional image attachments). */
